# Tusculan Disputations

*Cicero · 45 BCE*

A series of five philosophical discussions Cicero sets at his villa in Tusculum, bearing on what threatens or secures happiness: death, pain, distress, and the passions. Books III and IV in particular set out the Stoic therapy of the soul's disturbances.
